steps.title: Identify the process result
steps.content: The first sentence describes collecting sediment samples and analyzing them with OSL dating to determine the approximate age of wooden tools. The next sentence gives what that process indicated.

steps.title: Reject comparison signals
steps.content: A and D would introduce a similarity or comparison, and C would simply add another point. The sentence needs a transition showing the final result of the dating process. The answer is B.
